review_title: Great AI Engine, but more flexibility in what pages to process would be helpful
description: I found the AI engine good, but it was a waste to process all the pages and splitting of documents didn't help much and it just ate up credits
author: Paul G.
pros: Easy to use. AI engine was good at detecting the appropriate information. The AI engine seemed to recognize similar documents that followed on later and got the processing correct on the first try.
cons: limited to Templates or using the Freeform AI engine. You should be able to use both. You should be able to select what pages to process for Templates vs regular AI and it would be good to allow flexible page processing based upon the first page of data.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Awesome, it did exactly what I needed it to do, would love to take this to the next level of complexity
author: Matthew P.
pros: Ease of use, Easy to extract, Didn't overcharge, reprocessing was great!!!!! The helpdesk responded quickly.
cons: I could not figure out how to run Calculated fields, or conditionals using the prompts. Would be cool to enable the information in an LLM to interrogate
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Does very reliably what we need it to do and great customer service. Easy to set up and we connected it through Zapier to other tools we're using and everything worked seamlessly (with the AI parsing at least)
cons: The manual parsing didn't work so well for us, but the AI parsing worked perfectly. Also, we have a very small use case and there was not the perfect pricing tier for our very tiny need in volume.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I will be canceling . Had I known the volume restrictions I would not have purchased
author: Thomas K.
pros: Idea is good but definitely not worth the money . Bait and switch at it worst
cons: Insane pricing and volume restrictions . I wish more of it was
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I have a challenge in finding good data entry people. Parseur has impressed me as a great tool to meet that challenge.
author: Daniel M.
pros: I am impressed with the detail that I am able to instruct Parseur to extract and the ability to format the data extracted to my standard.
cons: You are asking me this question too early. I would like six more months of experience with the product before I answer. Preliminarily, I would love the ability to receive from Parseur a zip+4 code for addresses extracted. This would require an external call to the USPS.com zip code search.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Parseur: Your Escape From Handwritten Data Entry
description: I'm keeping my Parseur membership for the foreseeable future. Its time-saving is absolutely worth it.
author: Kyndall E.
pros: I was skeptical that it could actually do decent OCR, but I was very pleasantly surprised. It's incredibly capable and saved me a ton of time with data input. The ability to also instruct the AI is critical in how much I enjoyed using it. I think that's what Parseur has above
cons: For an individual, the price is a little steep. It would also be nice to be able to buy one-off credits to finish up a project that might be above your monthly page count.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Perfect tool to extract Utility bill data on a massive scale!
description: Easy that's 10/10. I searched google for "AI tool to extract data from over 5,000 PDF of electrical bills and put in to an excel file". I was given 3 options. I viewed all of them. Parseur was priced right and fit my description perfectly.
author: Joseph Z.
pros: I was able to try out the software using their "free" plan to see if it would even work for me, before I ended up uploading over 5,700 PDFs of electrical bills. Even better was that each PDF was 3 pages each, but there is a setting that I was able to use that would only scan the 1st page. The data collected was neatly organized in an excel file. There was a minor hiccup in how the data was being displayed, but a quick online chat with one of there techs was able to resolve the issue (which was due to user error). Looks like their program can extract and analyze a lot, but for me I got everything I needed out of it. Can't go wrong with their pricing too!
cons: With any AI product, it requires some general understanding of how you need to word the instructions. I would be nice if there was a guided tutorial once you signed up. That might exists, and I just didn't see it. If so, make it more transparent.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far very happy. Seamless experience from initial signup on the free plan to purchasing a subscription.
author: Jamey C.
pros: Easy to use, intuitive platform, quick customer service responses. Had a minor issue based on my own misunderstanding that was resolved quickly
cons: Needed a little help to setup at beginning which caused me to burn the initial 20 credits. Once resolved, worked flawlessly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Once set up it is very accurate in pulling the information I need each and every time. Also the data format once extracted is very easy.
cons: It is slightly difficult to determine if Parseur fits my needs with the limited free trial. However, the team was kind enough to grant me extra tokens to make sure it was a fit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Michelle M.
pros: Ease of use and very user friendly. The website is very polished and allows you to automatically extract data into an excel file which cuts down time. I also liked how the free plan is available to try out the software.
cons: It seems less trainable than competitior softwares where it relies more on AI than allowing you to make a custom software. However I have not delved too deep into it yet so that feature may be available.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: great for connecting to zapier and creating quickbooks invoices
author: kate S.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] did a demo with me and taught me how to use the AI effectively. once i learned how to use the AI, the data parsing has been going very smoothly. was able to connect to zapier to automate quickbooks invoicing.
cons: more youtube videos on how to use the software would be great! any support on connecting to zapier would be super helpful
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's straightforward to use and didn't take long to understand the processes.
author: Jeet B.
pros: The ease of use and automations are really helpful.
cons: Not having robust Database functionality.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Bernard R.
pros: Parseur is a highly customisable product and has a solution for straightforward data extraction through to complex spreadsheets. We have used the software for many years and have found it to be a robust, easy to use and reliable product.
cons: More complex documents can be tricky to configure however the technical support team have always been on hard top provide assistance.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Alexey V.
pros: Easy to use, simple to extract data, prompt service. Thank you very much Sylvain and Sylvestre that been always there, to help me with every issue or software settings even at your days off : ) This guys have the best customer support on their market for sure. I strongly advise to every one.
cons: Maybe a little bit better view of incoming data. Overall no complaints. Very glad to be a part of Parseur customers.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Renaud C.
pros: Le logiciel Parseur est très pratique, il nous permet d'analyser les mails reçus d'une manière très efficace. De plus le support technique est très sympa et réponds rapidement. Ils font en plus évoluer leur produit en fonction des demandes de clients.
cons: J'aimerais pouvoir créer des templates, à partir d'anciens templates déjà créés.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great software for quickly setting up email parsing
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Sleek and easy to setup and use. Excellent customer service, responding quickly and comprehensively.
cons: Lack of additional tweaks to the parsing when it doesnt pickup exactly what you need. That being said, they're releasing updates regularly, and I'm sure this will be part of their dev roadmap.
author_profession: Regional Operations Manager at ZEN Rooms (Rocket Internet)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best customer service, and so easy to use
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use and great service! They are always quick to respond and always help where they can. Great to have the type of support they provide.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Angelo S.
pros: Parseur is a professional tool with lots of tweak-possibilities. In our case we have mails with not so straightforward logic in the order of fields. But with great help of them, it does the job perfectly,.
cons: For difficult cases help of an expert is probably needed, but they provide this help.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great technology and amazing customer service
description: It's been amazing working with parseur team. They take their customers seriously and help them at every turn. From integration to debugging and scaling. The support team has been most helpful and made things easier for us.
author: Sarosh M.
pros: It's simple and integrating with their system is very easy
cons: If analytics can be improved it will be a huge win.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Exactly what I needed and Excellent Customer Service
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is exactly the app i was looking for to use to extract applicant info from LinkedIn. Very easy to use and setup. If you have any questions or need help setting it up, the customer service is quick and amazing! So far i had a great experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Nicole L.
pros: Helpful and knowledgable support to answer any questions
cons: I am very satisfied with this product although it may be helpful to have available more tutorial videos. However, with that said, the support staff via chat are wonderful and were able to answer my questions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Big Fan with only a few quirks!
description: I’ve been really impressed with this software. I’ve tried dozens of AI model document parsing programs and so far this is the best one I’ve seen by far.
author: James C.
pros: I love how intuitive the AI model is and how well it is understanding what I’m looking to do. It even read handwritten checks and parsed them as line items.
cons: The document to template to sample to etc process is a bit confusing. You have to upload a doc, process it, then create a template. But then that removes the ability to download the data from that doc which means you have to upload another doc which uses credits. And the AI is different than the template which has to be enabled or disabled if you’re wanting to use the Fields model. Maybe I’m just confused while using it but there are a few too many steps in that process for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Parseur has been an awesome tool helping with efficiency. It has helped me automate large amounts of bid requests for a reasonable cost.
author: Frank D.
pros: Simplicity, effectiveness, and customer service
cons: There is literally nothing I don't like about Parseur. It just works and improves.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Amazing. Time Saving and Super Cool
description: I love Parseur, a game changer in AI and helping people to make their work and lives easier! The versatility of the document reader and OCR technology is like I have never seen before.
author: Mark L.
pros: Parsuer is amazing. It managed to process my racing pigeon pedigrees data which saved me tens of hours of manual inputting!
cons: It takes a little time to get your head around how it works, but once you have figured it out, it's a breeze!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: excellent. customer service and support has been excellent also.
author: Michael L.
pros: Easy to use. Great ability to leverage AI functionality plus custom mapping to provide the most accurate file possible.
cons: the document screen only allows you to show up to 500 records at a time. would be great to be able to go up to 1,000 or 2,000.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
